case_title: NATIONWIDE INSURANCE COMPANY OF AMERICA VS. MARIELA MATAMOROS ROBLES ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-25-2018 CONTINUED TO JUN-27-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
